input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.3.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.3.6
            TITLE: completely sealed accumulator containers must have a pressure relief valve

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.3.6: Completely sealed Accumulator Containers must have a pressure relief valve
EV.4.3.6 Completely sealed Accumulator Containers must have a pressure relief valve

final_answer: Completely sealed Accumulator Containers must have a pressure relief valve
